files.content:
HealthCare+
Plans Coverage Benefits Help
Plans Coverage Benefits Help
Trusted by 2M+

Complete Health
Protection

Comprehensive coverage for you and your family. Affordable plans. 10,000+ network hospitals.

2M+

Members

50+

Years Legacy

Insurance Plans

Flexible coverage options for every need

Basic

₹299/month

  • ₹5 Lakh coverage
  • 500+ hospitals
  • Cashless claims
POPULAR

Premium

₹599/month

  • ₹15 Lakh coverage
  • 5,000+ hospitals
  • Ambulance service
  • OPD coverage

Elite

₹999/month

  • ₹50 Lakh coverage
  • 10,000+ hospitals
  • Wellness benefits
  • 24/7 support

What's Covered

Hospitalization

Room charges, surgery, medicines. Pre & post-treatment care.

Doctor Consultations

OPD visits, specialists, emergency care. Free annual checkup.

Diagnostic Tests

Lab tests, X-rays, ultrasound. 20% discount on pathology.

Medications

Prescribed medicines covered. Generic & branded options.

Why HealthCare+

Instant Claims

Claim processed in 24 hours. Cashless at network hospitals.

24/7 Support

Customer service available always. Multi-language support.

Secure & Safe

Data encrypted. Privacy guaranteed. ISO certified.

Questions?

30 days waiting period for general claims. Accidents covered from day 1. Pre-existing diseases after 2 years.
Yes, you can upgrade your plan anytime. No penalties. Changes effective from next month.
Yes, add spouse, children, and parents. Family floater plans available with special discounts.

Secure Your Family's Future

Get comprehensive health insurance today
